message:
fix(raptorq): resolve clippy lints in D7 test_log_schema and related tests

Add #[must_use] to validation/formatting fns, replace redundant guards
with direct pattern matches, use method reference instead of closure,
and remove useless format!() in tests.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
